blockers.title: Terms page is not verbatim from the vault
blockers.evidence: The spec stop-the-line says `/terms` must be built verbatim from `02 Membership Terms & Website Conditions (Draft)` (`specs/trust-pages.spec.md:9-13`), and `SOURCE-MAP.md:20` repeats that. The page adds a member-facing hero lede at `src/pages/terms.astro:42-45` that is not in the vault public Terms copy, which starts at `Who these terms are between` (`/Users/ismac/Documents/Projects/WAI/02 Platform/02 Membership Terms & Website Conditions (Draft).md:25-32`).
blockers.required_fix: Remove the invented lede or add that exact sentence to the vault public Terms copy before rendering it, then rerun the gate.

non_blocking_notes: No authorization, secret, data leakage, or minor-safeguarding regression was found in the changed backend/client code; the only Convex change is the policy-version bump.
I did not run build or E2E in this read-only review environment; Gate 5 still needs a green run.
The added user-facing diff lines do not introduce em dashes.

spec_compliance.criterion: /privacy page from vault, styled, no draft banner
spec_compliance.evidence: The page renders the amended vault privacy body with EN nav/footer and uses the 2026-07-02 policy version per the resolved owner decision.
The public safeguarding statement is present and the data-handling cross-reference links to `/privacy`.

spec_compliance.criterion: Footer updates EN + AR, including Terms handling
spec_compliance.evidence: Footer links are internal and include safeguarding, but Terms handling is incomplete because `/terms` is not verbatim from its vault draft.

spec_compliance.criterion: UX-1 noscript and verify timeout state
spec_compliance.evidence: /join, /portal, and /verify include noscript messages; `VerifyApp` adds an 8-second fallback state.
`public/robots.txt` allows the site, disallows `/portal` and `/verify`, and points to the sitemap index.
`@astrojs/sitemap` is configured and filters URLs containing `/portal` and `/verify`.

spec_compliance.criterion: Canonical URLs + og:url on every page from one site constant
spec_compliance.evidence: All Astro pages pass `path`; `Base.astro` emits canonical and og:url from `SITE`, also used by `astro.config.mjs`.

spec_compliance.criterion: hreflang EN/AR alternates on six page pairs
spec_compliance.evidence: The six EN/AR route pairs pass reciprocal `path` and `alternate` props, with x-default pointing to EN.
`src/pages/404.astro` renders the plain-language message, Home/Join/Contact links, and an Arabic line.

spec_compliance.criterion: Organization JSON-LD on EN and AR home pages
spec_compliance.evidence: Both home pages include Organization JSON-LD with name, url, logo, parentOrganization, sameAs, and email.
`tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts` covers privacy, safeguarding, robots, sitemap, canonical/hreflang, and rendered 404 content; execution was not run here.
`src/pages/terms.astro:42-45` adds a non-vault lede to a legal page that the spec requires to be verbatim.

summary: Do not ship until the Terms page is made exactly vault-sourced. The rest of the trust-pages slice appears structurally compliant from static review.
